title: cephalanthera lancifolia
intro: Cephalanthera lancifolia, also known as the Lancifolia Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Its health benefits are attributed to its high levels of antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Cephalanthera lancifolia can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
